name: Holo Capture
summary: Capture, annotate and share your screen — every capture verified.

description.p: A screenshot you share should be yours, verifiable, and never touch a server.
The W3C Screen Capture API grabs a screen, window or tab; a full annotation toolset marks it up; the result is a content-addressed object.

ul: Capture a screen, window or tab
Annotate: arrows, shapes, text, blur, counters

releases.description: Flameshot's full tool set in the browser: W3C screen capture, content-addressed κ-verified captures, copy/save/pin/share.
